batch_summary: In a clinic, Ross comforts a somber Monica while briefly mentioning some good news of his own. Outside Central Perk, Phoebe meets Stephanie, a professional guitarist, and defensively questions her musical skills and equipment. Meanwhile, a panicked Chandler and Joey call the Transit Authority from a payphone, trying to recover a baby they accidentally left on a city bus.

In a clinic examination room, Ross tries to comfort a somber Monica, attempting to lighten the mood by mentioning some good news he received, though Monica remains unresponsive. Outside the Central Perk coffee shop, Phoebe encounters Stephanie, a professional guitarist scheduled to perform. Feeling threatened, Phoebe defensively questions Stephanie's knowledge of chords and boasts about her own guitar strap. Meanwhile, Chandler and Joey find themselves in a frantic situation at a public payphone. Joey is wearing an empty baby carrier, and Chandler calls the Transit Authority under the guise of doing "book research" to ask what happens if a baby is left on a bus. Joey takes over the call, bluntly admitting they lost a baby in a white plastic car seat on a city bus, only to be quickly referred back to Chandler.

Meanwhile, Chandler and Joey rush to the Department of Health Services to retrieve the lost baby. Posing as a couple to the clerk, they are led to a nursery full of babies. Panic sets in when they realize they cannot distinguish Ben from another baby, especially after a "mole" Joey uses for identification turns out to be a piece of debris that falls off.
